headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From MarketAxess’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: MarketAxess delivered first quarter results that surpassed Wall Street’s expectations, with management attributing the outperformance to strong execution of its long-term strategy and continued momentum in non-U.S. product areas. CEO Christopher Concannon highlighted that product areas outside U.S. credit grew by 20%, while emerging markets and Eurobonds benefited from record trading volumes and expanded client networks.
